name: Mallow-Graham Bars
recipeIngredient: 1 package HONEY MAID Honey Grahams, coarsely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large saucepan over low heat, melt the margarine.
2. Add marshmallows; stir until melted.
3. Remove from heat; stir in graham crackers, raisins, and peanuts.
4. Spread mixture into a greased 9x9 inches baking pan.
5. Cool for 1 hour or until firm.
6. Cut into 18 bars.
7. Store in an airtight container.
Makes 18 bars.
